name: nextjs
guidance: Prefer Server Components, inspect local Next docs when required, keep client boundaries small.

name: react
guidance: Keep state local, avoid effects for derivations, use composition for reusable UI.

name: typescript
guidance: Encode component contracts, avoid any, use discriminated unions for complex states.

name: tailwind
guidance: Use tokenized utilities, mobile-first breakpoints, and avoid arbitrary values without reason.

name: shadcn
guidance: Inspect components.json, extend variants, preserve Radix accessibility behavior.

name: radix
guidance: Respect focus, roles, portals, and data-state styling.

name: tanstack
guidance: Use for complex table/query state; define empty/loading/error paths.

name: zustand
guidance: Use small stores with selectors; avoid globalizing local state.

name: redux
guidance: Use for broad app state with clear slices; avoid boilerplate for local UI.

name: prisma
guidance: Keep DB access server-side; model loading/error states in UI.

name: drizzle
guidance: Use typed queries server-side and keep schema concepts out of generic UI.

name: rtl
guidance: Use logical properties, dir boundaries, icon mirroring checks, and mixed-LTR isolation.
